top_signals.title: Credit Suisse Veteran Named $5 Billion Firm’s Abu Dhabi CEO
top_signals.summary: Azura Partners, a wealth advisor backed by one of the Middle East’s largest alternative asset managers, named Credit Suisse veteran Yousef Hajjar to oversee its Abu Dhabi operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: IBM shares set to plunge 22% as customers shift spending to AI
top_signals.summary: Chief executive Arvind Krishna says company ‘faltered’ as clients raced to buy servers and storage
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: United Airlines' new upsell: Keeping other travelers out of the middle seat
top_signals.summary: United Airlines will allow customers to pay more to keep the middle seat open on its Airbus A321XLRs
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: US Stock Futures Fall as Mideast Tensions Flare Anew, Oil Climbs  Bloomberg.com

top_signals.title: City watchdog eyes rules overhaul for UK asset managers
top_signals.summary: The UK’s financial watchdog has proposed a host of reforms aimed at simplifying reporting for asset managers and end industry confusion over complicated regulations. The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) said the modernisation of the rules will tailor requirements for asset managers, cut costs for firms and provide better data for the sector, saving managers £128m [...]
